bookings_import_row_end_after_start.name: bookings_import_row_end_after_start
bookings_import_row_end_after_start.value: "bookings_import_row"."end_time" IS NULL OR "bookings_import_row"."start_time" IS NULL OR "bookings_import_row"."end_time" > "bookings_import_row"."start_time"

chk_open_play_reservation_xor_group.name: chk_open_play_reservation_xor_group
chk_open_play_reservation_xor_group.value: (("open_play"."reservation_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("open_play"."reservation_group_id" IS NOT NULL)::int) = 1

chk_reservation_identity.name: chk_reservation_identity
chk_reservation_identity.value: (("reservation"."player_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("reservation"."guest_profile_id" IS NOT NULL)::int) = 1

chk_reservation_target.name: chk_reservation_target
chk_reservation_target.value: (("reservation"."court_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("reservation"."coach_id" IS NOT NULL)::int) = 1
